title: hymenasplenium laetum
intro: Hymenasplenium laetum, also known as the shining spleenwort, is a type of fern native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating various health issues due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hymenasplenium laetum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
